blocking_items: same outer OOF reused adaptively across stages without frozen sequential-inference rule
stage references and outer-fit-only union authorization are underspecified
F1-F5 dispatcher lacks exact thresholds, missing-evidence behavior and successor DAG

cohort-dependent Top5 agreement feature is unsafe for production scoring
reliability weight-only contract conflicts with reliability-conditioned sampling

claim EF5=5, binding, blocking, Kd, Docking Gold or production promotion

primary_quantitative_finding.interpretation: The target requires recovering about half of the union positives not already hit by L1; head/loss tuning alone is not supported by existing evidence.
